---
title: "Alejandro Camara"
subtitle: "Student - International Business & Marketing Management"
about:
  template: trestles
  #image: #images/photo.png
  links: 
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/acamara-cpp/
    - icon: X
      text: X
      href: https://x.com/alexcamara_01
---

## Career Aspiration

Before graduating, I aim to secure an internship where I can gain hands-on experience and expand my skill set. My short-term goal is to transition into a full-time position, where I can continue to grow and become a valuable contributor.

## Skills

- Bilingual in English and Spanish.

- Microsoft Office Skills: Excel, Word, PowerPoint, Outlook.

- Experienced in R for Data Wrangling and Visualization  

- Critical Thinking

- Time Management

- Decision Making

## Education

California State Polytechnic University, Pomona

**Bachelor of Science in Business Administration**

Concentrations: International Business and Marketing Management
